title: Create Modpack
description: Create is a Mod pack to create machines and factories.
body:
# Create Modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1

Welcome to the **Create Modpack**, where your imagination is the only limit! Dive into a world of innovation and creativity as you harness the power of the Create Mod and its most popular addons to craft, automate, and build your own unique Minecraft experience.

## About This Modpack

This modpack compiles 30 of the most widely-used Create Mod addons into one streamlined package. Whether you’re an engineer at heart or a creative builder, you’ll find endless opportunities for automation, contraptions, and adventure.

> **Note:** This modpack is still in development and will receive regular updates to enhance your gameplay experience.
## Bug report
> **Note:** Bug reporting is currently not supported
